falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (10% above current level) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the pattern's implied consolidation phase

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 (current score: 41) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme bullish momentum, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal's implied market equilibrium

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX drops below 12 (current level: 18) and remains there for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a sharp and sustained decline in volatility would falsify the pattern's implied market uncertainty, proving the 'HOLD' verdict incorrect

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
